items.question: Are these rounds live ammunition?
items.answer: No. These are completely inert training dummy rounds intended only for dry fire practice, function checks, and safe firearms training. They contain no primer, no powder, and no projectile, and cannot fire under any circumstances.

items.question: What materials are used?
items.answer: Our training rounds are manufactured from high-strength durable PLA material engineered for repeated training cycles. The material helps maintain consistent shape, reliable feeding, and long service life during repetitive drills.

items.question: What are these rounds used for?
items.answer: Training rounds are commonly used for dry fire practice, malfunction clearing drills, magazine loading and unloading practice, chamber and cycling checks, and firearms handling instruction.

items.question: Are the dimensions realistic?
items.answer: Yes. Each dummy round is engineered for consistent chamber fit and cycling checks, closely matching real ammunition dimensions to provide a realistic training experience.

items.question: Can these rounds damage a firearm?
items.answer: No. These rounds are designed specifically for safe dry-fire training and repeated chambering when normal firearm safety rules are followed.

items.question: Who are these rounds intended for?
items.answer: Our products are primarily supplied to shooting instructors, training centers, firearms schools, retailers, distributors, and law enforcement training programs.

items.question: Which calibers do your dummy rounds support?

variants.label: 9mm
variants.answer: Our 9mm dummy rounds are designed for safe dry-fire training, loading and unloading drills, magazine practice, and chamber checks in firearms chambered in 9mm.

variants.label: 10mm
variants.answer: Our 10mm dummy rounds are intended for safe dry-fire training, handling drills, and function checks in firearms chambered in 10mm Auto.

variants.label: .40 S&W
variants.answer: Our .40 S&W dummy rounds are suitable for safe dry-fire practice, loading drills, and handling exercises in firearms chambered in .40 S&W.

variants.label: .45 ACP
variants.answer: Our .45 ACP dummy rounds are designed for safe training use, including dry-fire practice, magazine drills, and chamber checks in firearms chambered in .45 ACP.

variants.label: .380 ACP
variants.answer: Our .380 ACP dummy rounds are ideal for safe dry-fire training, loading and unloading drills, and function checks in firearms chambered in .380 ACP.

variants.label: .357 SIG
variants.answer: Our .357 SIG dummy rounds are intended for safe dry-fire training, handling drills, and chamber checks in firearms chambered in .357 SIG.

variants.label: .44 Magnum
variants.answer: Our .44 Magnum dummy rounds are designed for safe training, including loading, unloading, and function-check practice in firearms chambered in .44 Magnum.

variants.label: .38 Special
variants.answer: Our .38 Special dummy rounds are made for safe revolver training, including loading and unloading drills, handling practice, and cylinder function checks.

variants.label: .22 LR
variants.answer: Our .22 LR dummy rounds are suitable for safe training with rimfire firearms, supporting loading practice, handling drills, and basic function checks.

variants.label: .223 Remington
variants.answer: Our .223 Remington dummy rounds are designed for safe rifle training, including loading and unloading drills, cycling practice, and function checks in firearms chambered in .223 Remington.

variants.label: .308 Winchester
variants.answer: Our .308 Winchester dummy rounds are ideal for safe rifle training, helping with loading drills, cycling practice, and general function checks in firearms chambered in .308 Winchester.

variants.label: 12 Gauge
variants.answer: Our 12 Gauge dummy rounds are intended for safe shotgun training, including loading and unloading drills, action cycling practice, and handling exercises.

variants.label: FN 5.7×28mm
variants.answer: Our FN 5.7×28mm dummy rounds are designed for safe dry-fire training, handling drills, and function checks in firearms chambered in 5.7×28mm.

items.question: How can I place a wholesale order?
items.answer: Simply submit the Wholesale Request Form on our website. Our team will contact you with pricing options, bulk packaging availability, and shipping details.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: Delivery usually takes 5–10 business days depending on order volume and destination.
